headline: The Bull Case For VeriSign (VRSN) Could Change Following Strong Q1, Higher Guidance And Dividend News - Learn Why
summary: VeriSign, Inc. reported first-quarter 2026 results with revenue of US$428.9 million and net income of US$214.5 million, raised full-year guidance, and its board approved a US$0.81 per-share cash dividend payable on May 27, 2026. The company also highlighted a record .com and .net domain base, strengthening its position at the core of global internet infrastructure while preparing for a wholesale .com price increase in November 2026. We’ll now examine how the record domain base and higher...
